tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most tests are effectively text/structure checks: they parse YAML and check for key presence, read file contents and check for string presence (e.g., 'assert skill_dir.name in readme_content', 'assert content.startswith("---")', 'assert "name:" in frontmatter'). test_not_tautological.reason: The tests cannot be satisfied without actual changes. The tool 'llm-analytics-evaluation-summary-create' must be enabled with proper schema fields (it starts disabled), the skill directory 'exploring-llm-evaluations/SKILL.md' must exist (it doesn't yet), and the README must reference all skill directories including the new one. The agent could read solve.sh at the path shown in the Dockerfile context, or simply fetch that git commit to get the exact solution files.
